reasoning: The control 3.5.7 focuses on enforcing password complexity and character changes for user authentication, which is primarily a concern for IAM systems managing user credentials. Kubernetes itself does not manage user passwords directly. Instead, Kubernetes relies on external identity providers for authentication, such as OIDC, LDAP, or cloud IAM services. Therefore, password policies are enforced outside of Kubernetes, and there is no direct equivalent control within Kubernetes to enforce password complexity.
title: 3_5_7: 3.5.7 Enforce a minimum password complexity and change of characters when new passwords are created
